ab: Keriden no singsi kami tayra i pinanowangan anini, misarayaray kami i ka’ayaw no fawahan a mi’aca to paya.
ch: 今天老師帶我們去動物園，我們在門口排隊買票。
en: Today the teacher took us to the zoo, and we lined up at the gate to buy tickets.

ab: Micomod to i pinanowangan i, sowal sa ko singsi, “ora i ka’ayaway i, o ’aya’ayam, kaikor i, o ’one’oner, saniyaniyah han to ita a minengneng.”
ch: 進入動物園後，老師說:「前面是鳥類，後面是蛇類，大家自己參觀。」
en: After entering the zoo, the teacher said, "There are birds in the front and snakes in the back, so you can visit them yourself."

ab: Matalaway kako to ’oner, mansa cowa pinengneng kako to ’oner.
ch: 我會怕蛇，所以我不看蛇類。
en: I'm afraid of snakes, so I don't look at snakes.

ab: Adihay ko ma’araway no mako a ’ayam, saefeefer sa cangra i kilakilangan, ma’araw haca ko ekong i ofang no kilang a mafoti’.
ch: 我看到了很多鳥，他們在樹上飛來飛去，還有看到貓頭鷹在樹洞裡睡覺。
en: I saw a lot of birds flying around in the trees and saw owls sleeping in tree hollows.

ab: Ira ko eco, efa ato lokedaw i pinanowangan, cowa ho paka’ara’araw kako tona pinanowang, paka’araw anini he:mek sa ko faloco’.
ch: 動物園裡有大象、馬和老虎，我從前沒有看過這些動物，今天看到了真的很開心。
en: There are elephants, horses and tigers in the zoo. I have never seen these animals before. I was really happy to see them today.

ab: Adihayay ko nisasingan no mako, sapipanengneng ci amaan ato ci inaan.
ch: 我拍了很多照片，給爸爸媽媽看。
en: I took a lot of pictures and showed them to my parents.

ab: Cila to a romi’ad hacafayen to no mako ci ama ato ci ina a tayra.
ch: 下次要跟爸爸媽媽一起來。
en: Next time I will come with my parents.
